owners.detail_link: Owner of this restaurant? Add your direct ordering link →
owners.heading: For restaurant owners
owners.intro: Forkeur compares delivery fees and menu prices across UberEats, Deliveroo and Takeaway in Brussels. We list restaurants automatically from public data.
owners.section_add_body: If your restaurant accepts orders directly on your website, we can show it alongside delivery platform prices — helping customers choose you and avoid platform fees. Use the form below.
owners.section_remove_body: You can ask us to remove your restaurant from Forkeur at any time. Select "Remove my listing" in the form and we will process it within a few days.
owners.type_add_url: Add / update my direct ordering link
owners.success: Request received — we will get back to you within a few days.
owners.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
